overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l l} E _ {1}: & S & \text {(success on first trial)} \\ E _ {2}: & F S & \text {(failure on first, success on second)} \\ E _ {3}: & F F S & \text {(first success on the third trial)} \\ E _ {4}: & F F F S & \text {(first success on the fourth trial)} \\ \vdots \\ E _ {k}: & \underbrace {F F F \ldots F} _ {k - 1} S & \text {(first success on the k^{th} trial)} \\ \vdots \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l l} E _ {1}: & S & \text {(success on first trial)} \\ E _ {2}: & F S & \text {(failure on first, success on second)} \\ E _ {3}: & F F S & \text {(first success on the third trial)} \\ E _ {4}: & F F F S & \text {(first success on the fourth trial)} \\ \vdots \\ E _ {k}: & \underbrace {F F F \ldots F} _ {k - 1} S & \text {(first success on the } k^{\mathrm{th}} \text { trial)} \\ \vdots \end{array}
